## What does this PR do?

- [ ] Adds a new tool/service
- [ ] Updates existing tool information
- [ ] Fixes a dead link
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I've verified the link works
- [ ] I've placed the entry in the correct category
- [ ] I've followed the entry format from CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have **not** included affiliate/referral links (maintainers only)
- [ ] The tool is genuinely useful for crypto nomads

(Optional — personal experience, why this tool belongs here, etc.)
